description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and test. Use a fedora image for the build job, which runs a before_script to install gcc, make, dpkg, and rpm-build, then executes ./configure && make && make install, edits epm.list with sed, builds a deb package via epm -v -f deb epm-deb epm.list and an rpm package via epm -v -f rpm epm-rpm epm.list, and stores all files under lin*/* as artifacts. Add a test_deb job that runs on an ubuntu image, extracts the generated epm-deb*.tgz, installs the .deb with dpkg -i, and runs epm --version. Add a test_rpm job that runs on a fedora image, extracts the epm-rpm*.tgz, installs the .rpm with dnf install -y, and runs epm --version. Both test jobs execute in the test stage.
